plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — Aspire (4 skills incl. aspire-mcp-first), OpenTelemetry, ILSpy, Blazor Playwright, 3 specialized .NET agents, rider-mcp-first (50-90% token savings on .NET work, 0.5.1 sharpens projectPath discipline + multi-project workflow handling + subagent dispatch rule), grill-with-docs, improve-architecture, caveman.
